zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Villiers Sir Knight III於大約1400年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷時，他的父親John de Villiers21歲，母親Joan de Meering40歲。他與Joan Bellers結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1480年在英國萊希斯特斯爾布盧可斯比享年81歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Villiers Sir Knight III于大约1400年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷时，他的父亲John de Villiers21岁，母亲Joan de Meering40岁。他与Joan Bellers结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1480年在英国萊希斯特斯爾布盧可斯比享年81岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Villiers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Villiers, the name of several places in France, all named from Late Latin villare ‘(part of an) outlying farm, dependent settlement’ (see Villars ). Compare Devilliers .

variants.name: Villars
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Henri.

French: habitational name from any of various places called Villars, from Late Latin villare ‘(part of an) outlying farm, dependent settlement’, a derivative of Latin villa ‘country house, estate’ (later used of a group of houses forming a settlement).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Villiers Sir Knight III was born about 1400, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, his father, John de Villiers, was 21 and his mother, Joan de Meering, was 40. He married Joan Bellers. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1480, in Brooksby, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Villiers Sir Knight III est né environ 1400, à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, John de Villiers, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joan de Meering, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Joan Bellers. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1480, à Brooksby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

Er hat Joan Bellers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. ja.lifeSummary: William de Villiers Sir Knight IIIが約1400年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイで生まれた時，父John de Villiersは21歳，母Joan de Meeringは40歳であった。Joan Bellersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1480年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアブルークスビーで81歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Villiers Sir Knight III(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Villiers(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Meering(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Joan Bellers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1480년 영국 레이스스터실르 브룩스비에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Villiers Sir Knight III nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Villiers, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Meering, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Bellers. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Villiers Sir Knight III родился около 1400 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Villiers было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joan de Meering, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Bellers. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1480 г. в местности бруксби, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия.
